title: Choreographers
description: Create new dance routines. Rehearse performance of routines. May direct and stage presentations.

tasks.text: Direct rehearsals to instruct dancers in dance steps and in techniques to achieve desired effects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise dancers on standing and moving properly, teaching correct dance techniques to help prevent injuries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach students, dancers, and other performers about rhythm and interpretive movement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record dance movements and their technical aspects, using a technical understanding of the patterns and formations of choreography.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and stage dance presentations for various forms of entertainment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Choose the music, sound effects, or spoken narrative to accompany a dance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Experiment with different types of dancers, steps, dances, and placements, testing ideas informally to get feedback from dancers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seek influences from other art forms, such as theatre, the visual arts, and architecture.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop ideas for creating dances, keeping notes and sketches to record influences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate production music with music directors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design dances for individual dancers, dance companies, musical theatre, opera, fashion shows, film, television productions, and special events, and for dancers ranging from beginners to professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Audition performers for one or more dance parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess students' dancing abilities to determine where improvement or change is needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design sets, lighting, costumes, and other artistic elements of productions, in collaboration with cast members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train, exercise, and attend dance classes to maintain high levels of technical proficiency, physical ability, and physical fitness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and study story lines and musical scores to determine how to translate ideas and moods into dance movements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage dance schools, or assist in their management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Restage traditional dances and works in dance companies' repertoires, developing new interpretations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
